untranslatable_reason: Signal requires options-specific metrics (delta neutral confirmation, implied volatility percentile, strike price convergence, time to expiration in days, ratio spread structure) that are not available in the equity price/technical indicator universe. These are derivatives pricing and Greeks-based conditions that cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally an options strategy rule based on the Greeks (delta), implied volatility surface, and strike selection. The backtest engine provided is designed for equities/futures with price-based technical indicators. A proper implementation would require: (1) options chain data, (2) delta calculations, (3) IV percentile rankings, (4) days-to-expiration tracking, and (5) multi-leg position management. The provided partial translation uses RANGING regime detection as a proxy for the 'underlying near short strike' expectation, but cannot capture the core logic of delta neutrality, IV regime, or convergence tolerance without options data structures.
